rag_rules: Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they relate to component ports
Use valid AGREE syntax for assumptions, guarantees, equations, constants, and assignments
Write output range guarantees using visible feature names and concrete bounds
Avoid implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Use AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) for declarations
generic_rules: Use visible feature names in contracts when possible
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation annexes
Avoid AADL property names in AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed
Use concrete bounds or named constants in range expressions
Write deterministic dependency guarantees relating outputs to inputs
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks use `annex agree {** ... **};` syntax
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not encode AADL timing properties directly in AGREE expressions
Do not use invalid AGREE type names like 'integer' or 'boolean'
Do not mix implementation and type-level concepts in contracts
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names are not AGREE variables
